inquiry.title: Technical Inquiry
inquiry.description: Common questions regarding our CUxS integration and defense protocols.

questions.q1: What is the maximum detection range of the system?
questions.a1: Our integrated RADAR and RF scanning suite can detect standard commercial drones at a range of up to 3km with an RCS of 0.01m².
questions.q2: Does GNSS Spoofing cause interference with civil aviation?
questions.a2: No. Our directional spoofing technology is precision-targeted to the threat's coordinates, minimizing signal leakage to authorized aircraft.
questions.q3: Can the system operate in extreme weather conditions?
questions.a3: Yes, the hardware is IP67 rated and tested for operational stability in temperatures ranging from -20°C to +60°C.
questions.q4: How does the system handle 'Dark Drones' (Radio Silent)?
questions.a4: Drones without RF emissions are identified using our EO/IR thermal imaging cameras and AI-driven optical tracking software.

stats.heroMessage: Intuitive control in even the most complex environments.

overview.title: Integrated Anti-Drone Defense System
overview.description: Mirae Tech Vision delivers sophisticated, specialized defense systems to counter the rapidly evolving landscape of advanced drone and UAV threats.

tech.platform: The Mirae Tech Vision Anti-Drone Platform provides a unified Command & Control (SW) system, integrating RF Scanners, RADAR, EO/IR Cameras, GNSS Spoofers, RF Jammers, and Communications Spoofing technology.

stage1.title: Drone Detection
stage1.details: Long-range detection (>5km, RCS 0.03m²) via RADAR & RF Scanners.

stage2.title: Drone Tracking & Monitoring
stage2.details: Ku band 3D 7Km tracking Radar Tracking and monitoring with RF Scanner

stage3.title: Drone Identification
stage3.details: EOIR to Identify drone images and models RF Scanner to identify the drone model

stage4.title: Drone Neutralization
stage4.details: Satellite Signal Spoofer on non-commercial drone RF Jammer on commercial drone. Communication Signal Spoofer on commercial drone Hardkill(Interception drones)

heroVideo.title: Counter-Drone, Simplified
heroVideo.content: Easy to train, simple to use, quick to deploy, multi-mission CUxS solutions.

Products.description: Explore our comprehensive range of cutting-edge anti-drone products, designed to provide robust defense against evolving aerial threats.

component_list.title: EO/IR
component_list.details: Deep Learning identification algorithm for flight vehicles. Automatic video tracking. Path prediction function. EO/IR camera for drone video identification and tracking – 2km identification range. Automatic video tracking AI algorithm.

component_list.title: Commercial Drone Detection Equipment
component_list.details: Detection of Commercial Drones in the 400GHz – 6GHz Frequency Band. Detection of New Drones by Extending Software with New Frequency Additions. Minimum of one Library Update per Year (eg: DJI Ocusync 4 Encrypted Drone Detection, Autel Skylink 3.0 Detection). Decode Encrypted New Drone Protocols using Self-Developed Software (for DJI and other encrypted drones). Detection range 4km

component_list.title: Commercial Drone Detection Equipment
component_list.details: Detection of Commercial Drones in the 400GHz – 6GHz Frequency Band. Detection of New Drones by Extending Software with New Frequency Additions. Minimum of one Library Update per Year (eg: DJI Ocusync 4 Encrypted Drone Detection, Autel Skylink 3.0 Detection). Decode Encrypted New Drone Protocols using Self-Developed Software (for DJI and other encrypted drones).Detection range 4km

component_list.title: Radar
component_list.details: One radar for 360° omni-directional detection of small drones (RCS: 0.03㎡) Detection/Identification: 5 km and Tracking: 7 km.Pulse Doppler Rotary X-band Detection Radar, Ku-band Tracking Radar. Automatic Identification of Detection Objects: Drone / Bird / Vehicle / Ship

component_list.title: Satellite signal spoofer
component_list.details: The Drone Neutralization Equipment - GNSS Satellite Signal Spoofer is a specialized defense system designed to protect critical infrastructure from unauthorized UAV/drone intrusions, whether operating in autonomous or manual satellite navigation (GNSS) flight modes. This low-power spoofing system effectively targets GNSS L1/L2 signals (GPS, GLONASS, Beidou, and Galileo), with optional expansion to GNSS L5. With a transmit power of 5W, it provides a protection radius of over 3,000 meters using advanced satellite signal spoofing technology. The system offers 360-degree omnidirectional coverage and is capable of defending against multiple drones simultaneously, 24 hours a day. It also features real-time drone intrusion detection, defense, and expulsion capabilities, including anti-jamming functionality

component_list.title: Precision-Guided GNSS Spoofing System
component_list.details: Precision directional induction and defense against commercial and non-commercial intruding drones. Effective neutralization of anti-jamming drones. Precision guidance radius: 150m – 3km. Advanced drone defense system with zero collateral damage. Radar-integrated precision drone induction system.

component_list.title: Communication Spoofing System
component_list.details: Detection, tracking, identification, and neutralization of commercial drones via radio frequencies. Perimeter access control to fend off unauthorized drones within the defense zone. Forced guided landing to designated locations via pre-configured safe paths. RF scanner-integrated drone defense system. Forced landing distance 2km

tableData.value: Carbon fiber / Nylon fiber / Aluminum alloy

component_list.title: Drone Docking Station
component_list.details: Compared to the long charging time, which is the limitation of drones, there are short operating times and limitations in human operation and data collection. To overcome the limitations of the drone industry, docking stations applying unmanned technology provide unmanned operation system convergence services such as automatic take-off and landing, wireless charging, storage, remote control system, data transmission and reception, and self-power generation through solar power generation.
